hero.title:
Beauty that breathes

with time
hero.subtitle: A refined sanctuary of care at Quinta da Bicuda, where every gesture is designed to reveal your essence.

philosophy.title: True beauty lives in the attention to the smallest details — in the touch, the time, the listening.
philosophy.p1: In the heart of Cascais, Chi Sublime is more than a salon: it is a sensory refuge where every visit celebrates your individuality.
philosophy.p2: Our team combines refined technique with products of excellence to create truly memorable experiences — no rush, no formulas.

services.title: The Chi Sublime menu
services.intro: From hair to the smallest gesture, every service is performed with the precision of treating each client as one of a kind.

descriptions.cabelereiro: Cuts, colouring, highlights, straightening, vegan treatments, strand-by-strand extensions.
descriptions.sobrancelhas: Personalised design, brow lamination, pigmentation and cleanup.
descriptions.maquilhagem: Premium and bridal make-up — for the moments when every detail matters.
descriptions.unhas: Manicure and pedicure, classic or gel.
descriptions.depilacao: Full-body waxing treatments with gentle products.

team.title: Three professionals, one single focus
team.intro: Meet the people behind every Chi Sublime experience — and choose who you want to be with.

contact.title: Your moment begins with a booking
